DungeonScan

Photograph a hand-drawn dungeon → get a clean battle map + a Universal VTT file (walls, doors, line-of-sight) that drops straight into FoundryVTT / Arkenforge / Dungeondraft. Runs 100% on-device — native macOS app, no cloud.

Grid auto-detect: 5/5 on real notebook photosAuto-straighten angled shotsEditable: walls, doors, rooms, symbols
